なんだとお前！？<br>いったいどこの国の者だ！？: What did you say?! Which nation are you from?!
エルドラーナだよ！<br>そういうお前こそいったいどこの田舎もんだっての！: I'm from Eldorana! You're the one from some backwater country!
あ、始まった始まった……♪: Ah, here we go, here we go...♪
バカ野郎。フィルムの無駄遣いだ。<br>もうこの程度の小競り合いじゃ、記事になら: You idiot. Wasting film. Fights like this don't make news anymore.
確かに。やっぱり紙面を熱くさせるには、分かりやすくダメで<br>強烈なキャラクタ:
True. To really heat up the pages, we need a clearly flawed but
strong character—"Scoop"—to show up.
そういうことだ。さっさと特ダネさんの取材に行ってこい！: Exactly. Now get going and cover Scoop!
は～い。特ダネさんの尾行取材に行ってきま～す。: Okaaay! I'm off to tail Scoop!
司令官！ 書類仕事、お疲れ様でした～。<br>がんばりましたね！: Commander! Good work on the paperwork! You did great!
あぁ、疲れた……。<br>さて、仕事も終わったし、新聞でも読むか。: Ah, I'm beat... Well, work's done, might as well read the newspaper.
あ、読み終わったらわたしにも貸してください。<br>各国から届く新聞は貴重な情報:
Oh, please lend it to me when you're done! Newspapers from each
country are such valuable intelligence!
娯楽としても価値が高いよなぁ。<br>ん？: They're pretty entertaining too, huh? Hm?
『スクープ！ 前線基地で特ダネをキャッチ！』？<br>俺たちの特集が組まれている:
"Scoop! Catching a Big Story at the Frontline Base!"? They did a
feature on us!
『前線基地という名前は立派だが、<br>寄せ集めの兵たちが集まっている、仮設防衛: Though it bears the grand name of Frontline Base, it's nothing more than a makeshift defense outpost filled with a ragtag bunch of soldiers.
『粗暴な傭兵は酒場で酔って悪態をつき、価値観の違う三国兵士による<br>喧嘩も頻: The rough mercenaries get drunk at the tavern, curse, and you've got soldiers from the Three Nations fighting all the time. Seriously, they'd pick a fight before they'd pick up a fork.
『もちろん連中に服や髪型に気を遣う余裕やセンスなんて一切ない。<br>キチンとし: Of course, those guys have no sense or spare time to care about clothes or hairstyles. They should be replaced with a proper, well-organized defense force.
……散々な言われ様だな。<br>ひょっとしてアリシア、知っていたのか？: ...That's quite the scathing review. Alicia, did you know about this?
は、はい……<br>実はその記事、基地内で話題になっていたんですよ～……: Y-yes... Actually, that article has been going around the base...
根も葉もないデマ――と完全には否定できないが、悪意が見える記事だな。<br>どこ:
I can't completely dismiss it as a groundless rumor, but this article is
clearly written with malice. Which newspaper is it?
エルドラーナです……<br>抗議しますか？:
It's from Eldorana...
Should we lodge a complaint?
ふん、放っておけ。どうせみんな、すぐに忘れるだろう。<br>……んっ？:
Hmph, leave it. Everyone will forget soon enough.
...Huh?
（……窓の外に誰かいたような気がしたが、気のせいか？）:
(...I thought I saw someone outside the window, but maybe it's my
imagination.)
あっぶなー！ あたしの気配に気づくなんて……司令官だけあって、<br>なかなか勘:
That was close! To think he'd notice my presence... As expected of
the Commander, his instincts are sharp. He doesn't even flinch at this.
でも、その余裕――いつまで続きますかね～？<br>ふふふっ♪:
But that composure—how long do you think it'll last?
Fufufu!♪
やたらと視線を感じるが……いったいなんなんだ？: I keep feeling eyes on me... What the hell is going on?
し、司令官～！ 大変！ 大変なんです～！ これを見てください！<br>例のエルド:
C-Commander! Big trouble! Please look at this!
It's that Eldorana newspaper...
……『緊急スクープ！ 前線基地の司令官はクズの極み！？』<br>『彼に近しい女性:
...'Urgent Scoop! Frontline Base Commander: Trash Incarnate!'
'Interviews with the Women Close to Him ↓'
『司令官がどんなひとか？<br>……まぁ、英雄らしい英雄といいましょうか――悪い:
'What's the Commander like?
...Well, he's a hero in the worst sense of the word.'
『え？ おにーさんにいじめられたことあるかって？』: 'Huh? You want to know if Big Bro has ever bullied me?'
『ま、まぁ、けっして生真面目な方ではないですよね～』: 'W-well, he's definitely not the serious type, is he?'
『……等と言っているが、明らかに司令官に怯えている様子が見て取れた。<br>パワ:
'Saying that, but the women were clearly terrified. Evidence of power
harassment. And him going through women one after another—'
『はいぃ。それはもぉ。旦那さまは前線基地の主みたいなものですからねぇ。<br>わ:
'Yeees, that's right. Honey is like the master of this base, you know.
And as for me... right? Fufufu!♡'
『……というわけで、裏は取れてしまった。実際、尾行をしてみると<br>司令官は酒:
'...And so, the background check confirmed it. Tailing the Commander
shows he visits the tavern nightly, indulging in luxury.'
『権力を利用した卑劣な暴挙は断じて許されない。<br>本紙記者は引き続き、取材を:
'This underhanded abuse of power is absolutely unforgivable. Our
reporter will continue investigating this trash Commander. Wait for the next issue!'
というか……アリシアもしれっと<br>インタビューでひどいこと言ってないか！？:
And come to think of it, Alicia, didn't you say something awful in that
interview too?
ご、誤解です！ わたしもソフィアさんたちも、<br>司令官の良いところをたくさん:
N-No, that's a misunderstanding! Sophia, the others, and I talked a
lot about your good points, Commander!
悪意を持って切り取られた、ということか？: So they were maliciously taken out of context?
そうですよ～！ こんな記事を書かれるなんて心外です！<br>断じて許せません！:
Exactly! I'm appalled that they'd write something like this! It's
absolutely unforgivable!
ん？ 待て、インタビューに応じたということは――<br>お前、この記事を誰が書い:
Huh? Wait, if you were interviewed—do you know who wrote this
article?
はい！ 女性記者の――エメルダさんと名乗っていました！: Yes! A female reporter—she called herself Emeralda!
なるほどな……。<br>よし！ エメルダを探しにいくぞ！: I see... All right! Let's go find Emeralda!
あーっ！？ 司令官、この方ですよ！<br>この人がエメルダさんです！: Ah! Commander, this is her! This is Emeralda!
はい、どうも。エルドラーナの新聞記者、エメルダと申します！<br>アリシアさん、:
Hello! I'm Emeralda, a newspaper reporter from Eldorana. Thank you
for your cooperation with the interview the other day, Alicia!
あの記事、読者の反響がすごくて！ 上司もニコニコですよ。<br>ボーナスもらえち:
That article was a huge hit with readers! My boss is all smiles. I even
got a bonus. Maybe I'll get promoted!
なんなんですか、あの記事！？ 訂正してください！: What was that article all about! Issue a correction!
訂正って何をです？ あたし、聞いたままを書いただけですよ？<br>嘘は書いてない:
Retract what? I only wrote what I was told. I didn't print any lies, did
I?
だけど、他にもいっぱいお話ししたじゃないですか！<br>最初の数分だけをあんなに:
But we talked about so many other things! It's not fair to only
dramatize the first few minutes like that!
でも、事実は事実ですし～。「表現の自由」です～。: But the facts are the facts. It's called freedom of the press.
エメルダ、といったな。一応確認だ。お前の記事は全て、<br>取材に基づいた真実だ:
Emeralda, right? Just to confirm. All your articles are based on true
reporting, so you have no intention of retracting them. Right?
そうです！ あたし、特ダネさんが酒場にせっせと通っているところ<br>バッチリ見:
That's right! I caught you, Scoop, visiting the tavern every single
day!
５日前は２２時４分から３時５分まで。４日前は２２時１４分から２時４６分。<br>:
Five days ago: from 10:04 PM to 3:05 AM. Four days ago: from 10:14
PM to 2:46 AM. Three days ago: from 9:08 PM to 4:29 AM.
毎日毎日、違う女性と朝まで飲んで騒いで、楽しませる――<br>……なかなか女泣か:
Every day, a different woman, partying until dawn — quite the
heartbreaker, aren't you?
いつか痴情のもつれで刺されそうで、あなたから目が離せませんよ。<br>ふふふっ♪:
One of these days you're going to get stabbed in a lovers' quarrel, so
I can't take my eyes off you. Fufufu!♪
参ったな。<br>さすがに時間はうろ覚えだが、たぶん合っている。:
You got me. I don't remember the exact times, but they're probably
spot on.
だから言ったでしょう？ 嘘は書いてないって。: See? I told you I don't write lies.
そうなると、俺はお前にずっと尾行されていたのに<br>まったく気配に気付かなかっ:
So that means you've been tailing me all along, and I never noticed a
thing.
俺は命を狙われることも多いから、周囲には気を付けているし、<br>身辺警護もさせ:
I'm often targeted for assassination, so I'm always alert, and I have
bodyguards.
にも関わらず、エメルダは尾行を察知されなかった。<br>相当な敏腕記者だ。:
And yet you managed to tail me without being detected. You're a
top-notch journalist.
そう！ 分かってくれます！？<br>あたしの取材力の高さが！！: Yes! You get it! My reporting skills are amazing!
特ダネさんの言う通りなんですよ！<br>あたし、けっこうすごいんです！: Just like Scoop said! I'm pretty incredible!
取材対象からクレームを受けたって動じませんし、<br>嘘だって１度も書いたことあ:
I don't even flinch when my subjects complain, and I've never once
written a lie!
加えて、読者の「知りたい」を巧みにくすぐる取材対象の選択に、<br>思わず読んで:
Plus, I skillfully choose subjects that tickle readers' curiosity and
write in a light, compelling style that makes you want to keep reading.
ただのゴシップではないんです！ あたしの記事は情報を素材にした娯楽！<br>極上:
They're not just gossip! My articles are entertainment made from
information! Exquisite cuisine! In other words, they're pure entertainment!
なのに！ 本社はこんな田舎にあたしを送り込んでしまいました……<br>こんなこと:
And yet! The head office shipped me off to this backwater... How is
that even fair!
んっ……？<br>お前、自分から望んで前線基地に来たわけではないのか？:
Hm...? You didn't come to the Frontline Base of your own free will,
did you?
あったりまえですよ～！ こんな辺境、好みじゃないです。<br>さっさと都会に帰り:
Of course not! This frontier isn't my style. I wanna get back to the
city ASAP!
オシャレなカフェでラテをテイクアウトして、ブランドショップを巡って、<br>スム:
Grabbing a latte from a trendy café, browsing brand-name stores,
doing a dessert crawl with a smoothie in hand, and refreshing with yoga and spa treatments...
それからやっぱり、オシャレなバーで合コン！ <br>こんな生活が恋しいんですよ～: And of course, a mixer at a chic bar! I really miss that life!
これは……相当ストレス溜まってるな……。: Looks like you've got a lot of pent-up stress...
テキーラのショットで乾杯したーい！: I wanna do tequila shots and toast!
それはオシャレじゃないだろう？: That's not very chic, is it?
あたしは飲みませんけど。: I'm not the one drinking, though.
でも、本社と上司は超特大のネタを取ってくるまで<br>エルドラーナに戻さないって:
But the head office and my boss say I can't return to Eldorana until I
get a super huge scoop... *sigh*
ふむ……<br>そういうことなら、しばらく俺に張り付いて密着取材をしてはどうだ？:
Hmm... In that case, how about you shadow me for a while and do some
embedded reporting?
あぁ。自慢じゃないが、俺はこの基地で一番目立っているから<br>いい記事ネタにな:
Yeah. Not to brag, but I'm the most conspicuous person here, so I
make great article material. Saves you the trouble of tailing me, right?
それは、まぁ、はい。<br>良い記事が書けたら都会に帰れるわけですし。願ってもな:
Well, yes, I suppose. I mean, if I can write a good article, I can go
back to the city. It's a dream come true.
<size=30>司令官、大丈夫なんですか……？</>: Commander, are you sure about this...?
<size=30>問題ない。下手に隠すより開示したほうがいい。</>: No problem. Better to come clean than to try and cover things up.
さて、まずは……大穴探索にでも同行してもらおうか。:
Now then, first off... how about you tag along on an expedition to the
Abyss?
